response: <<vegetable>> <<actor>> <<bottom>> <<pack>> <<sick>> <<f(x) = 2x³ - 3x² + ax + b>> <<when x = 2>> <<the polynomial evaluates to zero>> <<which creates a gap in the encryption pattern>> <<you want to fill>> <<use this information to find a relationship between a and b>> <<the equation is f(2) = 0>> <<substitute x = 2 into the polynomial>> <<2*(2)³ - 3*(2)² + a*(2) + b = 0>> <<calculate the values>> <<2*8 - 3*4 + 2a + b = 0>> <<16 - 12 + 2a + b = 0>> <<4 + 2a + b = 0>> <<so 2a + b = -4>> <<to enhance the encryption>> <<you decided to add another layer>> <<ensure that f(x) has a repeated root>> <<given that one of the roots is x = 2>> <<find the value of a and b>> <<such that the polynomial has x = 2 as a double root>> <<this means f(x) = (x - 2)² * (2x + c)>> <<expand the polynomial>> <<(x - 2)² = x² - 4x + 4>> <<so f(x) = (x² - 4x + 4)(2x + c)>> <<multiply the polynomials>> <<2x³ + cx² - 8x² - 4cx + 8x + 4c>> <<combine like terms>> <<2x³ + (c - 8)x² + (8 - 4c)x + 4c>> <<compare with the original polynomial>> <<2x³ - 3x² + ax + b>> <<match coefficients>> <<2x³ + (c - 8)x² + (8 - 4c)x + 4c = 2x³ - 3x² + ax + b>> <<set coefficients equal>> <<c - 8 = -3>> <<c = 5>> <<8 - 4c = a>> <<8 - 20 = a>> <<a = -12>> <<4c = b>> <<4*5 = b>> <<b = 20>> <<so
